rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Request For Document Production Set One, Of Son Nguyen And For Attorney Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel is granted as to the following document demands only: Thao Nguyen must provide a privilege log for Request Nos. 38 and 39. Thao Nguyen must provide tax returns responsive to Request No. 37. Thao Nguyen may provide a redacted copy to preserve any confidential information (social security numbers, etc.) These responsive documents must be provided no later than October 30, 2015. The mutual requests for sanctions are denied. If no further documents are provided by October 30, 2015, the moving party reserves the right to move for sanctions. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than October 14, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Of Son Nguyen And For Attorney Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel is granted as to the following form interrogatories only: 6.3, 15.1, 17.1 and 50.1. Thao Nguyen shall provide supplemental responses no later than October 30, 2015. Thao Nguyen shall further provide explanations of her response of "NA" to Request Numbers 9.1, 12.1, 17.1, 50.1, and 50.3-50.6 no later than October 30, 2015. The mutual requests for sanctions are denied. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. If no supplemental responses are filed by October 30, 2015, the moving party reserves the right to requests sanctions. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than October 14, 2015, at 4:00 p.m.
